'''Cornwall''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] embroiled in a civil war between two rival clans. [[Qell Tepine]], a member of the [[Star's Nova]] mercenary force, was implicated in the war.<ref name="Le facteur X" />

{{Planet-stub}}
